pairs.subject: Mandatory Training Session
pairs.desc:
Dear Team,

We are implementing a new mandatory training session for all employees to enhance our skills and knowledge. The training will take place on Friday, March 10th, at 10 AM in the main conference room. Please ensure your attendance as this is crucial for our upcoming projects.

Attached is a PDF with details about the training agenda and what to expect. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out.

Best regards,

HR Team
pairs.explain: The email is from HR, has a legitimate subject, and includes a safe attachment related to training.

pairs.subject: Urgent: Mandatory Training Session
pairs.desc:
Dear Team,

We urgently need you to complete the mandatory training session by the end of the week. Attached is the training document that you must download and execute to complete the session. Failure to comply may result in disciplinary action.

Please do this as soon as possible!

Best,

HR Team
pairs.explain: The email uses urgency and contains a malicious executable attachment disguised as a PDF.

pairs.subject: Quarterly Financial Report
pairs.desc:
Hello Team,

Attached is the quarterly financial report for your review. Please take a moment to go through the document and prepare any questions you may have for our meeting next week. Your input is valuable as we discuss the financial outlook for the upcoming quarter.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Best,

Finance Department
pairs.explain: The email is from the finance department, contains a relevant subject, and includes a safe PDF attachment.

pairs.subject: Important: Review Financial Report
pairs.desc:
Hello Team,

Please find the attached financial report that requires your immediate attention. It is crucial that you open the attachment and follow the instructions inside to ensure compliance with our financial policies.

Failure to do so may result in penalties.

Regards,

Finance Department
pairs.explain: The email pressures the recipient to open a dangerous attachment disguised as a PDF.

pairs.subject: IT System Update Notification
pairs.desc:
Dear Colleagues,

We are excited to inform you that we will be updating our IT systems this weekend. Attached is a guide on what to expect during the update process and how it may affect your work.

Please read through the document carefully and reach out if you have any questions.

Best,

IT Department
pairs.explain: The email is from the IT department, has a relevant subject, and includes a safe attachment.

pairs.subject: Critical IT Update Required
pairs.desc:
Dear Colleagues,

A critical update to our IT systems is required immediately. Please download the attached file and run it to ensure your system is compliant. This is mandatory for all employees.

Failure to do so could lead to system vulnerabilities.

Regards,

IT Department
pairs.explain: The email creates a false sense of urgency and includes a malicious executable file.

pairs.subject: Travel Policy Update
pairs.desc:
Dear Team,

We have updated our travel policy to better align with our current business needs. Please find the updated policy attached for your review. It is important that you familiarize yourself with the changes before your next business trip.

If you have any questions, do not hesitate to reach out.

Best,

Travel Department
pairs.explain: The email is from the travel department, has a relevant subject, and includes a safe PDF attachment.

pairs.subject: Immediate Action Required: Travel Policy Update
pairs.desc:
Dear Team,

Immediate action is required regarding our travel policy update. You must download and execute the attached file to confirm your compliance with the new policy. This is mandatory and must be completed within 24 hours.

Regards,

Travel Department

pairs.subject: Upcoming Security Awareness Training
pairs.desc:
Dear Team,

We are pleased to announce an upcoming security awareness training session scheduled for next Thursday at 2 PM. Attached is the training document that outlines the topics we will cover. Your participation is essential to ensure we maintain a secure working environment.

Thank you,

Security Team

pairs.desc:

It is imperative that you confirm your attendance for the security training by downloading and running the attached file. This is a critical requirement to ensure your access to company systems.
